question: How do you adjust the intensity settings on an electric toothbrush to suit your oral care needs?
content:
Choose one of the three intensity levels: High uses three lights, Medium uses two lights, and Low uses one light.<PIC>
1. To change the intensity from the handle, press the intensity indicator lights/hidden button to cycle through the levels.
2. You can change the intensity before, during, or after brushing.<PIC>
3. You can also customize the intensity in the app.
4. If Adaptive Intensity is active and you apply excess pressure for an extended period, the toothbrush automatically lowers the intensity by 1 level; each new brushing cycle returns to your pre-selected setting.
ret:
"Choose one of the three intensity levels: High uses three lights, Medium uses two lights, and Low uses one light.<PIC>

notes: Answered from the Philips Sonicare Prestige intensity settings and Adaptive Intensity sections. Included only the two images adjacent to the manual intensity-level and press-to-cycle instructions.
